productName: Legacy Truffles - DOH Compliant - Double Truffle Jays - .5g Pack - Larry Bird Kush - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Larry Bird Kush and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, earthy, and grape, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
